title: The weighted P0 projection residual has zero weighted mean

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For nonzero total mass, the residual after subtracting the weighted average has zero weighted mean.
assumptions: the residual is measured relative to the weighted average
informal.expected_conclusion: The weighted residual sum is zero.

declarations.name: weightedP0Projection2_residual_weighted_mean_zero
declarations.statement: theorem weightedP0Projection2_residual_weighted_mean_zero (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : m0 * (u0 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) + m1 * (u1 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) = 0

tasks.input: Translate the zero weighted-mean residual property of a two-cell weighted P0 projection into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem weightedP0Projection2_residual_weighted_mean_zero (m0 m1 u0 u1 : Real) (hsum : m0 + m1 ≠ 0) : m0 * (u0 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) + m1 * (u1 - weightedCellAverage2 m0 m1 u0 u1) = 0

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding the weighted average and simplifying the denominator.
tasks.target: Unfold weightedCellAverage2, use field_simp with hsum, and finish with ring.
